summary: Lead AWS Data Platform Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and recent hands-on focus in AWS data platforms, Python automation, PySpark/Spark pipelines, Redshift, S3, Glue, EMR concepts, production support, and cloud migration. Strong background building and operating data pipelines for large-scale telemetry and forecasting workloads in regulated financial-services environments. Experienced in SQL performance tuning, data quality, reconciliation, operational monitoring, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Git, and mentoring engineers through production delivery. Actively building Terraform fluency; do not represent Ansible or Alibaba Cloud as production strengths.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable, supportable production workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, and Amazon Redshift for scalable capacity forecasting and analytics workloads.
Migrated heavy forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle processing toward cloud-scale Redshift execution, improving scalability for parallel model runs and large historical datasets.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas and reporting structures for historical retention, seasonal analysis, and executive reporting; applied SQL tuning and data warehouse principles to production analytics systems.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS patterns and supported operational execution, troubleshooting, monitoring, and remediation for data processing workflows.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting datasets with data quality checks, reconciliation, and stakeholder-facing dashboards.
Developed Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards surfacing real-time capacity insights, underutilization findings, and operational risk indicators for senior stakeholders.
Mentored and collaborated with engineering, operations, and analytics teams on data pipeline reliability, documentation, incident analysis, and repeatable production support practices.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting production observability and service reliability.
Led the FAST project by mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing, application performance, and troubleshooting evidence across teams.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, managing enterprise monitoring architecture across 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Led large-scale APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime, coordinating cross-functional teams and production release activities.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation for performance reporting and operational data extraction, reducing recurring manual export work.
Created dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, technical documentation, and client training materials adopted across customer environments.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, supporting extreme transaction volumes with sub-second query performance goals.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining performance and reliability.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI testing framework to validate migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration cutover checks to preserve integrity during phased production transition.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, and PySpark-style ETL concepts. Focused on cloud migration, data lake structure, file format optimization, and AI-enabled data access.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting platform for enterprise capacity data, replacing manual forecasting with automated pipelines, model execution, and stakeholder dashboards.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based agentic workflow system with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and application tracking. Demonstrates orchestration, automation, and production-style guardrails.
